query: Find 10 parcels in Stavanger municipality that are located in agricultural land, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: inspect AR50 category columns to find the agricultural land code/value (DISTINCT arjordbr, artype)

4.description: select AR50 polygons filtered by the chosen agricultural category (will use value found in step 3)

5.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to the Stavanger municipality extent (join kommuner step1 with AR50 step4)

6.description: find parcels (teig) that intersect the reduced AR50 agricultural polygons (join teig step2 with AR50 reduced step5)

7.description: collapse to one row per teig (group by teigid) to avoid duplicates
